hero.title: Naqla Logistics
hero.subtitle: We connect businesses and individuals with Saudi Arabia's top transporters — competitive pricing, full transparency, and complete insurance on every shipment.

features.title: Why Naqla Logistics?
features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your shipments safely and efficiently

marketplace.title: Open Bidding Marketplace
marketplace.desc: Publish your request and invite dozens of verified carriers to bid competitively in minutes.

direct.title: Direct Carrier Request
direct.desc: Have a preferred carrier? Send them the request directly — they accept or propose a different price.

tracking.title: Live Map Tracking
tracking.desc: Track your shipment on the map from pickup to delivery.

escrow.title: Secure Escrow Payments
escrow.desc: Your money is held in escrow and only released to the carrier after delivery confirmation.

verified.title: Verified Carriers Only
verified.desc: Every carrier undergoes KYC verification: commercial registration, insurance, and valid transport licenses.

ratings.title: Transparent Rating System
ratings.desc: Rate carriers after every trip, and view others' ratings before choosing your bid.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps from request to delivery
howItWorks.step1Desc: Describe your cargo and define your route in five simple steps.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Verified carriers submit their bids — compare price, rating, and duration.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Funds held in Escrow until delivery. No surprises, no hidden fees.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Track the truck in real time. Once delivered, funds are released automatically.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of businesses using Naqla every day

footer.tagline: The smart logistics platform in Saudi Arabia — we connect businesses and individuals with Saudi Arabia's top transporters with full transparency.

about.title: About Naqla Logistics
about.subtitle: Redefining the logistics transport sector in Saudi Arabia
about.missionBody: We aim to unify the logistics transport market into one transparent platform, where clients find the best prices and services in minutes, and carriers find real, sustained demand to grow their business.
about.visionBody: To be the #1 transport and logistics platform in the Middle East, serving thousands of businesses daily through an expansive network of verified carriers.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Our team is ready to answer your questions and help with anything related to the platform
contact.name: Full Name
contact.subject: Subject (Optional)
contact.sentBody: We'll get back to you soon on your registered email.
